summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CLT Academy ERP new features: Collapsible navigation sections, Mentor Dashboard, and Bulk Import for Courses and Users. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working.

seed_data_creation: Test courses and users created during testing were cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features fully implemented and tested: 1) Navigation restructured into 6 collapsible sections (SALES, CUSTOMER SERVICE, ACADEMICS, OPERATIONS, SECURITY, FINANCE) with chevron icons. 2) Mentor Dashboard at /mentor/dashboard shows metrics (total_students, revenue, commission, upgrades, student_stages, recent_activities). 3) Bulk Import for Courses (POST /api/import/courses) and Users (POST /api/import/users) with CSV templates available at /api/import/templates/courses and /api/import/templates/users. Import buttons added to CoursesPage and UsersPage with ImportButton component.

features_verified.collapsible_navigation: Working - All 6 sections (SALES, CUSTOMER SERVICE, ACADEMICS, OPERATIONS, SECURITY, FINANCE) collapse/expand with chevron icons
features_verified.mentor_dashboard: Working - Shows all metrics: Total Students, Students Connected, Pending Connection, Upgrades Helped, Revenue Overview, Commission Summary, Student Pipeline, Recent Activities
features_verified.courses_import: Working - Import button on Courses page opens modal with template download, required/optional fields, file upload
features_verified.users_import: Working - Import button on Users page opens modal with template download, required/optional fields, valid roles list, file upload

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/mentor/dashboard: Returns mentor stats with all expected fields
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/import/templates/courses: Returns CSV template with required fields (name, code, base_price, category)
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/import/templates/users: Returns CSV template with required fields (email, full_name, role, password) and valid_roles list
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/import/courses: Accepts multipart/form-data CSV file, validates fields, creates/updates courses
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/import/users: Accepts multipart/form-data CSV file, validates role, skips duplicates, creates users with auto-derived permissions
